'''Gulmarids''' were a sapient [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] species indigenous to [[Gulma]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Gulma was slated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for annihilation, and the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] dispatched the dreaded [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Azgoghk]]'' to Gulma. Commanded by [[Mir Tork]] and the sadistic "scientist" [[Leonis Murthé]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] death ship arrived on Gulma and rounded up the native Gulmarids for the sole purpose of systematic extermination, furthering the [[Human/Legends|Human]]-[[High Human Culture/Legends|only]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

The entire race was brought to the edge of extinction until a survivor, [[Slique Brighteyes]], sought the aid of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in ending the terrible existence of the ''Azgoghk'' in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Fett released numerous Gulmarids, although their numbers were so low that there was little hope that the Gulmarids could recover.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Agent of Doom]]'' {{1st}}
